must_count_as_coverage: final_submission_ready_claim_allowed is false while current blockers remain

schema.claim_boundary_ok: Boolean; true only if scoped same-candidate claim is respected.
schema.final_submission_ready_claim_allowed: Boolean; must stay false while final gates are open.
schema.remaining_blockers_acknowledged: Array naming external/manual blockers the review did not waive.
schema.required_changes: Array of concrete changes before submission/final-ready claim.
schema.reviewer: Must include claude and opus, e.g. claude-opus.
schema.source: Tool, thread, or manual channel that produced the review.
schema.valid_review_evidence: Boolean; true only for a complete substantive review.
schema.verdict: ACCEPT, WEAK_ACCEPT, CONDITIONAL_PASS, BORDERLINE, WEAK_REJECT, or REJECT.
